Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface Rule

All Superinterfaces:
HasOrigin
All Known Subinterfaces:
BuiltInRule
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, AntecTaclet, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, FindTaclet, InfFlowContractAppTaclet, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTaclet, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTaclet, SMTRuleApp.SMTRule, SuccTaclet, Taclet, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WhileInvariantRule
public interface Rule extends HasOrigin
This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableList<Goal>
    apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp)
    the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.

    Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.HasOrigin

    getOrigin

  • Method Details

    • apply

      @Nonnull ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp) throws RuleAbortException
      the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
      services - the Services with the necessary information about the java programs
      ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
      Returns:
      all open goals below \old(goal.node()), i.e. the goals resulting from the rule application
      Throws:
      RuleAbortException - when this rule was aborted

    • name

      Name name()
      the name of the rule

    • displayName

      String displayName()
      returns the display name of the rule
